title: Consultant Project Management & Digital Transformation (all genders)
location: deutschlandweit (Ulm and all German Wavestone offices)
required_skills: Master's degree in BWL / Informatik / Ingenieurwesen or comparable
Experience in Project Management or Digital Transformation
Very good German AND English language skills
PM methodology knowledge: Agile, Scrum, classical
bonus_skills: Prior consulting firm experience (idealerweise in der Beratung)
matched_skills: PMO operations (HSBC – USD 8M digital transformation programme, 6 workstreams)
Cross-functional stakeholder coordination and international team management
Fluent German and English (plus Chinese / Cantonese)
KPI framework design and performance reporting (VfB Stuttgart, Hapag-Lloyd)
missing_skills: Prior management consulting firm experience (Beratungshaus background)
Formal Scrum Master certification not mentioned
Client-facing billable-hours / consulting delivery model experience not confirmed
key_requirements: Act as Junior Project Lead, PMO, or Scrum Master on client engagements
Support digital transformation of major European organisations
Structure and steer complex initiatives using classic, hybrid, and agile methods
Develop client solutions and present to management
Coordinate international teams alongside senior consultants
cv_highlights: HSBC PMO: led governance for USD 8M digital transformation programme across 6 workstreams with Steering Committee and C-suite exposure
Hapag-Lloyd: Agile sprint planning and KPI reporting in a technology operations environment
Power BI Certified: data storytelling and C-level dashboards
Multilingual: German, English, Chinese, Cantonese — valuable for international client projects
VfB Stuttgart: KPI framework and sustainability impact measurement (structured consulting-style deliverable)
gaps: No prior management consulting firm on CV — Wavestone recruits candidates who can immediately operate in a billable-hours consulting model; this is the primary risk
Degree level not specified in CV summary — Master's preferred; if only Bachelor's, it weakens competitiveness
Travel commitment across Germany (heavy Reisebereitschaft) not explicitly addressed in CV; needs to be signalled in cover letter
No explicit AI-tooling or AI-augmented project delivery experience mentioned, whereas JD emphasises AI-gestützte Ansätze
recommended_emphasis: Lead with the HSBC PMO narrative: USD 8M programme governance, 6 workstreams, Steering Committee — directly mirrors Wavestone's PMO/junior project lead role
Frame Hapag-Lloyd Agile delivery as Scrum-method experience; explicitly name sprint ceremonies, backlog management
Highlight multilingual capability (German + English fluency) as a client-facing asset for pan-European projects
Address travel readiness explicitly in cover letter to neutralise the Reisebereitschaft requirement
If Master's degree held, state it clearly at the top of the CV; if Bachelor's, emphasise depth of professional experience
Add a brief note on any AI or automation tools used in projects (Power BI automation, process digitisation) to match the AI-gestützte Ansätze emphasis
Reframe ECE Group and VfB Stuttgart work as structured, deliverable-driven consulting-style engagements to partially bridge the consulting gap
recommendation: Apply — strong functional match on PMO, Agile, digital transformation, and multilingual profile. The main risk is the absence of a consulting firm background, which Wavestone screening may flag. Mitigate with a sharp cover letter that positions HSBC and Hapag-Lloyd as consulting-equivalent engagements (client-facing governance, structured deliverables, executive presentations). Score is 75/100.
